catalog_price:
• $325.00  (Build, Configure, and Generate Family Tree).
  1. This is a one-time cost that covers building the foundation, configuring the architecture, building the root branch, and generating an inactive version of the root's family tree.

  2. The root's family tree will automatically become active, later, when the root's descendant children begin populating their family tree branches.

  3. The root branch is configured to display the root's photo, age, year born, year died (if deceased), and a historical narrative.  The root's descendant children are configured (in birth sequence order), and their names are displayed.

  4. Next, the root's demographic information is used as a template to generate an inactive version of the root's family tree.

  5. As mentioned above, later, when the root's descendant children begin populating their family tree branches, the root's tree will automatically become functional; having the ability to display descendant information, when descendant names are clicked.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Family Tree).

  • Root Narrative Limited to 200  Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If root is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:
  1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
  2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $125.00  (Build and Configure Family Tree Branch).
  1. Populating their family tree branch, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree, is how descendant children add themselves and their children to their parent's family tree.

  2. From generation to generation, descendant children (who have children of their own), must build out (populate) their family tree branch, at their birth sequence, on their parent's tree.

  3. If a descendant child is a minor, the parent can opt to add a child click to display the minor child's: photo, age, year born, and year died (if deceased).

  4. Activating child clicks are optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Head-of-Family).

  • Family Tree Branch Narrative Limited to 200  Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
  • If the family branch head is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:
  1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
  2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $15.00  Per (Child Click).
  1. A child click causes a minor child's: photo, age, year born, and year died (if deceased) to be displayed when the child's name is clicked.

  2. Activating child clicks are optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Click).

  • The Following fields Are Displayed:
  1. Child Photo.
  2. Computed Age.
  3. Year Born.
  • If child is deceased, the following fields are also displayed:
  1. An Asterisk (*) Indicating Deceased.
  2. Year Died, and Age at Death.

catalog_price:
• $25.00 Per (Child Narrative).
  1. A child narrative can be used to pay a special tribute, eulogize a dearly departed loved one, or recognize accomplishments.

  2. Child narratives are optional (you don't have to do).  The child's name will still display underneath his/her parent, but will not respond to clicks.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Child Narrative)

  • Child Narrative Limited to 200  Words.

  • Up to 3 narrative revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.

catalog_price:
• $45.00 Per (Family Member Tribute).
  1. A Family Member Tribute can be used to pay a special tribute, eulogize a dearly departed loved one, or recognize accomplishments.
catalog_price_frequency:
• Per (Family Member Tribute Card)

  • Family Member Tribute Card consist of:
    1. Cover (with photo)
    2. Inside left (wording)
    3. Inside right (wording)

    Tribute writeups are limited to 150  Words.

  • Up to 3 tribute revisions allowed before additional $10.00 charge due.
